headline: Cognizant Technology Solutions (NASDAQ:CTSH) is a High-Quality Value Stock with a Strong Balance Sheet
summary: Value investing screen identifies Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTSH) as a decent value stock with low P/E of 8.21, strong profitability, and minimal debt, offering quality at a discount.

headline: Earn 14% While You Wait To Buy ACN Stock On Sale
summary: Here is a way to collect an attractive income stream on a top-tier tech consultant now, which you keep no matter what, while lining up a chance to buy the stock at a serious discount if it keeps falling.
